description: Geography as narrative: the route draws on the map, then we land in the destination's own footage/art (the Samurai-in-Venice voyage device).
when_to_use: The narration moves between named places in order — a journey, a trade route, an exile. Two+ consecutive scenes: first the map beat, then the arrival beat with its own asset.

roles.note: the destination's own footage/still through the normal ladder — the cut from diagram to REAL place is the payoff
